official_functions.role: Write the full Configuration serverbound framed keep-alive packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed keep-alive packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded keep-alive payload id from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the keep-alive body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundKeepAlivePacket.
The decoded official ServerboundKeepAlivePacket preserves the keep-alive payload id.
The framed bytes, packet table id, and body bytes are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove runtime keep-alive echo behavior or Configuration completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer play-state keepalive or initialized runtime behavior.
